title: Index Range
documentation:
## Purpose
Specifies a numeric range of indices in the format `N` (single index) or `N-M` (inclusive range from N to M), used to select a subset of items from an ordered collection.

## When to use
Use this type to select pages, lines, chunks, or records by position. Supply `5` to select index 5 only, or `2-7` to select indices 2 through 7 inclusive.

## Notes
Pattern: `^\d+(-\d*)?$`. An open-ended range (e.g., `5-`) means "from index 5 to the end"; the machine must define this behavior. See [Pages](https://capdag.com/browse/media:pages) for page-specific document selection and [Outline Max Depth](https://capdag.com/browse/media:outline-max-depth;textable;numeric) for depth-based selection.
